channel.title: GitHub Visual Basic .NET Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Visual Basic .NET in GitHub

item.title: Puja0708/Library-Management-System
item.description: A Library Management System,made as our third semester project in college!

item.title: basildane/WakeOnLAN
item.description: Wake On LAN, WakeOnLAN, shutdown software for Windows. A powerful WOL, ping, shutdown, GUI application.

item.title: OfficeDev/Office-IT-Pro-Deployment-Scripts
item.description: A collection of useful PowerShell scripts to make deploying Office 2016 and Office 365 ProPlus easier for IT Pros and administrators. If you have any feature requests or ideas for future scripts please add the idea to the issues list in this repository
